'''鈭歞-s-ch-v''' ('''kadaschevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bear|bear]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-ch-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bear|bear]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-s-ch-v
|-
! Lemma
| kadaschevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidaschevoko|thidaschevoko]] || [[word:jidaschevoko|jidaschevoko]] || [[word:shidaschevoko|shidaschevoko]] || [[word:kidaschevoko|kidaschevoko]]
